title: Deduction Limits — AY2025-26
description: Maximum deduction limits for Chapter VI-A and other deductions. Referenced by Wave 3B rules as TaxTable:2024.deductions. These limits apply under the Old Regime only unless explicitly noted.
note: Wave 3B (Tax Adjustment Engine) rules will reference this table. Deductions are not available under the New Regime except where noted.

standard_deduction.note: Raised to ₹75,000 for AY2025-26 under Finance (No. 2) Act 2024 — applies to both regimes.

80CCC.note: Annuity plan from LIC or other insurer. Included within the ₹1.5L aggregate limit of 80C.

80CCD_1.note: Employee/self-employed NPS contribution. Included within ₹1.5L aggregate 80C limit.

80CCD_1B.note: Additional NPS contribution over and above ₹1.5L limit. Old Regime ONLY — Section 115BAC(2) excludes this. Only 80CCD(2) (employer contribution) is available under New Regime.

80CCD_2.note: Employer NPS contribution. Available under New Regime. 14% for Central Govt employees, 10% otherwise.

self_below_60.note: Health insurance premium for self/family if taxpayer < 60 years

self_senior.note: Health insurance premium for self/family if taxpayer ≥ 60 years

parents_below_60.note: Health insurance premium for parents if parents < 60 years

parents_senior.note: Health insurance premium for parents if parents ≥ 60 years

80E.note: Interest on education loan for higher education. No monetary cap. Available for 8 years from year of first repayment.

80G.limit_formula: Depends on sub-section — 100%/50% of donation, some with 10%-of-adjusted-gross-income cap
80G.note: Donations to approved institutions. See Section 80G sub-clauses for applicable percentage and cap.

80TTB.applicable_to: Interest income (savings bank, FD, RD) for senior citizens ≥ 60 years
80TTB.note: Replaces 80TTA for senior citizens. Cannot claim both.

HRA_10_13A.note: Old Regime only. Not available under New Regime.

LTA_10_5.formula: Actual travel cost (economy class / AC-2 rail) for domestic travel with family
LTA_10_5.note: 2 journeys per block of 4 years. Old Regime only.

interest_24b_SOP.note: Pre-construction interest is allowed in 5 equal instalments from year of completion.

interest_24b_LOP.note: Actual interest deductible without limit; losses can be set off against other heads up to ₹2L.

standard_deduction_30pct.note: 30% standard deduction on net annual value for let-out property.
